sentences.target: Ces casseroles sont en acier brossé.

translations.fr: Ces casseroles sont en acier brossé.
translations.es: Estas cacerolas son de acero cepillado.
translations.de: Diese Töpfe sind aus gebürstetem Stahl.
translations.it: Queste pentole sono in acciaio spazzolato.
translations.ko: 이 냄비들은 브러시 처리된 강철로 만들어졌어요.
translations.ru: Эти кастрюли сделаны из шлифованной стали.
translations.pt: Estas panelas são de aço escovado.
translations.vi: Những chiếc nồi này được làm từ thép chải xước.
translations.ar: هذه القدور مصنوعة من فولاذ مصقول بالفرشاة.
translations.nl: Deze pannen zijn van geborsteld staal.
translations.uk: Ці каструлі зроблені з шліфованої сталі.
translations.hu: Ezek a lábasok szálcsiszolt acélból készültek.
translations.hi: ये पतीले ब्रश्ड स्टील से बने हैं.
translations.pl: Te garnki są ze szczotkowanej stali.
translations.el: Αυτές οι κατσαρόλες είναι από βουρτσισμένο ατσάλι.
translations.nb: Disse grytene er av børstet stål.
translations.id: Panci-panci ini terbuat dari baja dengan finishing brushed.
translations.sv: De här kastrullerna är av borstat stål.
translations.ro: Aceste oale sunt din oțel periat.
translations.cs: Tyhle hrnce jsou z kartáčované oceli.
translations.da: Disse gryder er af børstet stål.
translations.ja: これらの鍋はヘアライン仕上げのスチール製です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; agrees in number with the noun (plural) and modifies 'casseroles'.
Common noun, feminine plural; subject of the sentence.
Auxiliary verb (copula) in present 3rd person plural; links the subject to the predicate 'en acier brossé'.
Preposition introducing a material complement.
Common noun meaning 'steel'; head of the prepositional phrase indicating material.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally) modifying 'acier' to indicate the finish.

sentences.target: On commande une barre d'acier demain.

translations.fr: On commande une barre d'acier demain.
translations.en: We’re ordering a steel bar tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana encargamos una barra de acero.
translations.ko: 우리는 내일 강철 봉을 주문할 거예요.
translations.yue: 我哋聽日會訂一條鋼條。
translations.pt: Amanhã vamos encomendar uma barra de aço.
translations.tr: Yarın bir çelik çubuk sipariş ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi đặt mua một thanh thép.
translations.nl: Morgen bestellen we een stalen staaf.
translations.hi: हम कल एक स्टील की छड़ मंगाएंगे.
translations.nb: I morgen bestiller vi en stålstang.
translations.id: Besok kami memesan satu batang baja.
translations.ro: Mâine comandăm o bară de oțel.
translations.da: I morgen bestiller vi en stålstang.
translations.ja: 明日、鋼の棒を注文します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/indefinite subject pronoun (often used as 'we'); takes 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; expresses the action.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'barre'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'commande'.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' before a vowel plus the noun 'acier'; functions as a material complement to 'barre'.
Temporal adverb indicating when the action takes place.

translations.es: Me encanta esta pulsera de acero.
translations.de: Ich liebe dieses Armband aus Stahl.
translations.ko: 이 스틸 팔찌가 정말 마음에 들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我很喜欢这条钢制手链。
translations.ru: Мне очень нравится этот стальной браслет.
translations.pt: Eu adoro esta pulseira de aço.
translations.he: אני אוהב את הצמיד הזה העשוי מפלדה.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích chiếc vòng tay bằng thép này.
translations.ar: أنا أحب هذا السوار المصنوع من الفولاذ.
translations.nl: Ik ben dol op deze stalen armband.
translations.uk: Мені дуже подобається цей сталевий браслет.
translations.hi: मुझे यह स्टील का कंगन बहुत पसंद है.
translations.id: Aku sangat suka gelang baja ini.
translations.ja: このスチールのブレスレットが大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun 'je' elided before a vowel and attached to the verb 'adore'; present 1st person singular.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'bracelet'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'J'adore'.
Preposition introducing a material complement.
Common noun indicating the material of the bracelet.

sentences.target: Le plan de travail est en acier.
sentences.reading: /lə plɑ̃ də tʁavaj ɛ ɑ̃ asje/

translations.fr: Le plan de travail est en acier.
translations.ipa: /lə plɑ̃ də tʁavaj ɛ ɑ̃ asje/
translations.en: The countertop is made of steel.
translations.it: Il piano di lavoro è in acciaio.
translations.vi: Mặt bàn bếp được làm bằng thép.
translations.el: Ο πάγκος εργασίας είναι από ατσάλι.
translations.ro: Blatul de lucru este din oțel.
translations.ja: カウンタートップはスチール製です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'plan'.
Common noun; head of the noun phrase 'plan de travail' (worktop/work surface).
Preposition introducing the noun complement 'travail' to form a compound noun phrase.
Common noun; complements 'plan' in the fixed expression 'plan de travail'.
Auxiliary verb (copula) in present 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate.
Preposition introducing a material complement.
Common noun indicating the material.
